text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 4 

AMI_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the AMI indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Conditions 
Warehouse (CCW) acute myocardial infarction (AMI; heart attack) indicator. The variable will be blank 
for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
